message.entry: 仅当尚未处于授权用户模式时，才能调用此项。
必须提供有效的用户名。
''checkout'' 选项需要功能名称。
''queryCheckoutState'' 选项需要功能名称。
''queryTestState'' 选项需要功能名称。
''test'' 选项需要功能名称。
功能名称必须少于 28 个字符。
(内部错误)尝试注册的对象太多。
{0} 需要 {1} 许可证。
License checkout failed.
Feature: {0} \nLicense path: {1} \nLicensing error: {2,number,integer},{3,number,integer}.
Diagnostic Information:
Make sure the HostID of the license file matches this machine, and that the HostID on the SERVER line matches the HostID of the license file.
Make sure your machine can communicate with the license server.
Check that the formatting of the license file is correct.
The port number on the SERVER line is incorrect. \nMake sure the SERVER line in your license file matches the SERVER line on the license server.
Make sure that the formatting of the license file is correct. \nWhen editing the license file use a basic text editor.
Make sure your machine can communicate with the license server.
The date on the computer is set for an earlier date than the license file was generated for. \nMake sure your system date is correct.
Error, borrowed license does not match any known server license.
Error returning borrowed license.
Cannot borrow product for that long.
Unable to connect to the license server. \nCheck that the network license manager has been started, and that the client machine can communicate with the license server.
Make sure the vendor daemon path in the license file is correct.
Make sure the license server port specified in the SERVER line of the license.dat file is not in use by another application. \nTry changing this port number and restarting the license manager.
The user/host has been excluded from {0} in the options file on the license server. \nContact your License Administrator to review the Options File.
User/host not on INCLUDE list for {0}. \nContact your License Administrator to review the Options File.
The formatting in the license file is incorrect. \nMake sure each instance of #, SERVER, DAEMON, and INCREMENT are left justified on a new line.

Unable to connect to the license server. \nMake sure that the client machine can communicate with the hostname listed in the SERVER line of the license file, and that the port listed in the SERVER line is not blocked by a firewall.

Your license for {0} has expired. \nIf you are not using a trial license contact your License Administrator to obtain an updated license. \nOtherwise, contact your Sales Representative for a trial extension.
Checkout exceeds MAX specified in options file. \nContact your License Administrator to review the Options File.
Maximum number of users for {0} reached. \nTry again later.
Could not borrow the product because borrowing is disabled for this product.
The license.dat file cannot be found.
Cannot find a license for {0}.
No licenses available to borrow.
Unable to connect to the license server. \nMake sure the vendor daemon path in the DAEMON line of the license file is correct.

This error may occur when: 
-The hostid of this computer does not match the hostid in the license file. 
-A Designated Computer installation is in use by another user. 
If no other user is currently running this program, you may need to activate.
The hostid of your computer ({0}) does not match the hostid of the license file ({1}). \nTo run on this computer, you must run the Activation client to reactivate your license.
Your username does not match the username in the license file ({0}). \nTo run on this computer, you must run the Activation client to reactivate your license.
Your username does not match the username in the license file. \nTo run on this computer, you must run the Activation client to reactivate your license.
Unable to connect to the license server. \nMake sure you can resolve the hostname of your machine. \nIf you are unable to resolve the hostname, contact your System Administrator.
SERVER and DAEMON lines are missing from the license file. \nYou will need to reinstall the network license manager to have these lines automatically added to the license file.
A new version of the network license manager is required. \nUpdate the license manager to the latest version.
This version is newer than the version of the license file and/or network license manager on the server machine. \nMake sure the license manager has been updated to the latest release.
The license file has been generated for a platform/processor that differs from this machine.
Verify that the HostID of the license file matches this machine, and that the HostID on the SERVER line matches the HostID of the license file.
This version is newer than the version of the license.dat file and/or network license manager on the server machine. \nMake sure the license manager has been updated to the latest release.
This version is newer than the version of the license.dat file and/or network license manager on the server machine. \nMake sure the license manager has been updated to the latest release.
This release requires a network license manager update and a new license file from the License Center.
The license start date is in the future. \nMake sure the system date on your computer is correct.
USER_BASED license has no specified users. \nMake sure the Options File exists and that the path to it is correctly listed in the DAEMON line of the license file.
License Manager cannot start. \nCheck that the ports specified in the license file are not already in use. \nRestarting your machine may clear the ports.
No diagnostic information available.
Troubleshoot this issue by selecting the button below or visiting: \n{0}
Troubleshoot this issue by visiting: \n{0}
System Error: {0,number,integer}
License Manager Error {0,number,integer}
Unknown license manager error.
